name: Francesco
lore:
Lore of Francesco
                                    


Living green onion with glasses, on a beach similar of that to Tralalero Tralala. Face has a happy emotion and wears glasses.
Lyrics
Lyrics (English)
Francesco! Francescooo! Franci! Francescinooo! Francelino! Francismo! Franceesscoooo! [Lyrics here]
Lyrics 2 (Italian)
Francesco!Francesco!Francino!No,a,questo Franco non piace nessuno!Lui é una mela non gli piace quella.caramella.che cosa?Broccoli e?perché?quando lo lesse sul retro céra scritto malsa na!mangiallie basta.panini al ciocolato fon dente e ccoli.Lo uccidertà.che cosa oltre ai broccoli.e doure,crederci!non ce ca farò!uccisione.perché se mangi 100 mele ti uccidera.
Lyrics 2 (English)
Francesco! Francesco! Francino! No, no one likes this Franco! He's an apple, he doesn't like that. candy. What? Broccoli and? Why? When he read it on the back it said unhealthy! Eat them enough. Dark chocolate sandwiches and chocolate. It'll kill him. What else besides broccoli? And you have to believe it! I won't do it! Killing. Because if you eat 100 apples, it will kill you.
